name: Trigger.dev
description: Open-source background jobs and workflow engine for AI apps. Run long tasks, cron jobs, and multi-step agent pipelines with resilient retries and MCP integration.

skills.name: Background Jobs
skills.description: Run long-running tasks in the background without timeout constraints or serverless cold starts

skills.name: Cron Scheduling
skills.description: Schedule recurring tasks with cron expressions and one-off delayed executions

skills.name: Retry & Recovery
skills.description: Automatically retry failed steps with configurable backoff and resume from checkpoint

skills.name: Realtime Logs
skills.description: Stream live task logs and status updates to the Trigger.dev dashboard or your app

skills.name: MCP Trigger
skills.description: Trigger jobs and query run status from Claude and other MCP-compatible AI agents
